sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - HEINRICH [I] von Henneberg, son of POPPO [VII] Graf von Henneberg & his first wife Elisabeth --- (-9 Apr 1262).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingen於1210年出生在德國薩辛-梅寧根亨內格時，他的父親Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg27歲，母親Elizabeth von Wilderberg Thuringen27歲。他和Sophia Wettin von Meissen至少有1個兒子。他去世於1262年4月9日享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingen于1210年出生在德国薩辛-梅寧根亨內格时，他的父亲Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg27岁，母亲Elizabeth von Wilderberg Thuringen27岁。他和Sophia Wettin von Meissen至少有1个儿子。他去世于1262年4月9日享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: III.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingen was born in 1210, in Henneberg, Saxe-Meiningen, Germany, his father, Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth von Wilderberg Thuringen, was 27. He had at least 1 son with Sophia Wettin von Meissen. He died on 9 April 1262, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingen est né en 1210, à Henneberg, Sachsen-Meiningen, Allemagne, son père, Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth von Wilderberg Thuringen, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sophia Wettin von Meissen. Il est décédé le 9 avril 1262, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingen 1210 in Henneberg, Sachsen-Meiningen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth von Wilderberg Thuringen 27. Er hatte mit Sophia Wettin von Meissen mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 9. April 1262 im Alter von 52 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingen è nato il nel 1210 nel Henneberg, Sachsen-Meiningen, Germania, il suo padre, Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth von Wilderberg Thuringen, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Sophia Wettin von Meissen. Morì il 9 aprile 1262, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingenが1210年にドイツサチセン-メイニンジェンヘネバーグで生まれた時，父Graf Poppo VII von Hennebergは27歳，母Elizabeth von Wilderberg Thuringenは27歳であった。彼はSophia Wettin von Meissenとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1262年4月9日に52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingen(이)가 1210년 독일 작센-인잉 헨버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth von Wilderberg Thuringen(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Sophia Wettin von Meissen(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1262년 4월 9일 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingen nasceu em 1210, em Henneberg, Sachsen-Meiningen, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth von Wilderberg Thuringen, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Sophia Wettin von Meissen. Ele faleceu em 9 de abril de 1262, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingen родился в 1210 г. в местности хеннебирг, сачсен-мининген, Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth von Wilderberg Thuringen, 27. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sophia Wettin von Meissen. Он умер 9 апреля 1262 г. в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich III. von Henneberg-Schleusingen nació en 1210, en Henneberg, Sachsen-Meiningen, Alemania, su papá, Graf Poppo VII von Henneberg, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth von Wilderberg Thuringen, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Sophia Wettin von Meissen. Murió el 9 de abril de 1262, a la edad de 52 años.
